label: Hibernatable comp
description: Marks a structure as hibernatable. The structure starts hibernating and must be started up before it becomes active. Used by the ship reactor.

startupDays.label: Startup days
startupDays.description: Number of in-game days the startup countdown runs before the structure becomes fully active.

incidentTargetWhileStarting.label: Incident target while starting
incidentTargetWhileStarting.description: IncidentTargetTagDef assigned to the map while this structure is starting up. Used by the ship reactor to enable raid-beacon incidents during the countdown.

sustainerActive.label: Sustainer active
sustainerActive.description: SoundDef looped while the structure is in the Starting or Running state.
